analysis_method: static standard-library provenance/log/source analysis only; no CUDA, no RunPod, no validation-data access

_loss_bpb.summary: _loss_bpb rescales token NLL by token_count/byte_count to report BPB.

_ppm_mixture_bpb.caveat: Static text/AST order only; runtime normalization proof is intentionally deferred to later phases.
_ppm_mixture_bpb.summary: _ppm_mixture_bpb converts token NLL to per-byte logp and scores bytes before updating PPM counts.

eval_val_ttt_score_before_update.caveat: Static order only; distributed coverage replay is reserved for Phase 2.
eval_val_ttt_score_before_update.summary: eval_val_ttt scores/records chunk NLL and bytes before the TTT training update gate.

ppm_subset_selection.summary: PPM-D scoring is statically capped by h.ppm_subset_tokens and the log reports the selected-token count.

timed_eval_wraps_eval_val_ttt.summary: train_and_eval wraps eval_val_ttt in timed_eval for the quantized_ttt metric.
